class Solution:
    def maximumSetSize(self, nums1: List[int], nums2: List[int]) -> int:
        from collections import Counter

        n = len(nums1)
        count1 = Counter(nums1)
        count2 = Counter(nums2)

        # Total unique elements in both arrays
        total_unique = len(count1 | count2)

        # Maximum number of elements we can keep from each array
        max_keep = n // 2

        # Count of unique elements in each array
        unique1 = len(count1)
        unique2 = len(count2)

        # We can keep at most max_keep elements from each array
        keep1 = min(unique1, max_keep)
        keep2 = min(unique2, max_keep)

        # The maximum size of the set s is the sum of the unique elements we can keep
        return min(keep1 + keep2, total_unique)
